revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[fr:Kofun d'Itasuke]][[ja:いたすけ古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:Itasuke Kofun zenkei.JPG|location={{ill|Kita-ku|qid=Q1042504|1=Kita-ku, Sakai}}|coordinates={{Coord|34.553333|N|135.485556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}|part_of={{ill|Mozu Tombs|qid=Q4250584|1=Mozu Tombs}}}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|talk|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User talk:Immanuelle|qq=}}) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|talk|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User talk:Immanuelle|qq=}}) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} rather than deleted from this draft or article {{ill|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|talk|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User talk:Immanuelle|qq=}}) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} ]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones {{ill|marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters|ja|marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through {{ill|Special:MassEditRegex|ja|Special:MassEditRegex|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Special:MassEditRegex|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese {{ill|User:Immanuelle|ja|User:Immanuelle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|User talk:Immanuelle|ja|talk|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User talk:Immanuelle|qq=}}) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Ancient Tomb |Name = Itasuke Kofun (いたすけ古墳) |image = [[File:Itasuke Kofun zenkei.JPG|280px]]
Full view of the tumulus (forepart in the foreground, rear circular part at the back) |所属 = {{ill|Mozu Tombs|en|Mozu Tombs|qid=Q4250584|lt=Mozu Kofun Group|1=Mozu Tombs}} |location = {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|Sakai|en|Sakai|qid=Q193428|lt=Sakai City|1=Sakai}}{{ill|北區|en|北區|qid=Q1180096|lt=Kita Ward|1=北區}} Mozu-honmachi 3-chō |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|33|11.70|N|135|29|7.84|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=いたすけ古墳}} |type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |area = Tumulus length 146 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}}
Height 12.2 m (rear circular part) |Burial Facility = Unknown |built = Early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|qid=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}} period |Interred Persons = |burial goods = Horned helmet-shaped {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}}, etc. |cultural property = National {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic Site|1=Historic site}} designated as “Itasuke Kofun”
(Included in the {{ill|Mozu Tombs|en|Mozu Tombs|qid=Q4250584|lt=Mozu Kofun Group|1=Mozu Tombs}}) |Special Notes = |地図2 = {{location map|Japan Osaka|coordinates=34|coordinates=33|coordinates=11.7|lon_deg=135|lon_min=29|lon_sec=7.84|map_dot_label= いたすけ古墳|mark=前方後円墳-北西.svg|marksize=23|caption=Location within Osaka Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|33|11.7|N|135|29|7.84|E}}}} }} [[File:750124_Itasuke_Kofun_aerial.jpg|thumb]] [[File:Itasuke_stereo.jpg|thumb]] [[File:Itasuke_Kofun_Aerial_photograph_2007.jpg|thumb]]'''Itasuke Kofun''' (いたすけこふん) is a keyhole-shaped tomb located in {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}} {{ill|Sakai|en|Sakai|qid=Q193428|lt=Sakai City|1=Sakai}} {{ill|北區|en|北區|qid=Q1180096|lt=Kita Ward|1=北區}} Mozu-honmachi, and is one of the tumuli constituting the {{ill|Mozu Tombs|en|Mozu Tombs|qid=Q4250584|lt=Mozu Kofun Group|1=Mozu Tombs}}. It is designated as a national {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic Site|1=Historic site}}. == Overview == [[File:Zen-emon-yama_Kofun_zenkei.JPG|alt=Zen'emon-yama Kofun (国の史跡)|thumb]] Located almost at the center of the {{ill|Mozu Tombs|en|Mozu Tombs|qid=Q4250584|lt=Mozu Kofun Group|1=Mozu Tombs}}, to the south of {{ill|Daisenryō Kofun|ja|大仙陵古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daisenryō Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and to the east of {{ill|Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|lt=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|lt=Kamiishizu Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamiishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}}, this tumulus has a mound length of approximately 146 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}}, making it the eighth largest within the group {{Sfn|百舌鳥古墳群（堺市）|2014年|p=55}}. The mound is built in three tiers, with an extension ({{ill|Extension|ja|造り出し|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Extension|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 造出|1=Platform-style projection|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17221469}}) on its southern side. Details of its main structure and accompanying grave goods remain unknown. Situated at the southern edge of a plateau, a large embankment was constructed on the southern side of the surrounding moat. Although several ancillary tumuli ({{ill|Ancillary tumulus|ja|陪塚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancillary tumulus|1=Baizuka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11658220}}) were once present, only the Zen'emon-yama Kofun remains {{Sfn|百舌鳥古墳群（堺市）|2014年|p=55}}. In September {{ill|1955|en|1955|qid=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}} (昭和30年), because it was privately owned, the tomb was slated for destruction due to soil extraction and residential development. Due to financial difficulties of the local government, acquisition proved challenging, and a {{ill|Citizen Movement|ja|市民運動|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Citizen Movement|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 市民活動|1=civic activity|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17173040}} was launched to preserve it{{cite news|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20190523/ddl/k27/040/330000c|title=Retro Exploration: Itasuke Kofun/Osaka|publisher={{ill|Mainichi Shimbun|en|Mainichi Shimbun|qid=Q1136866|lt=Mainichi Shimbun|1=Mainichi Shimbun}}|accessdate=2020-7-25|date=2019-05-23|author=加古信志}}{{cite news|url=https://mainichi.jp/articles/20190105/ddl/k27/040/184000c|title=Kofun Lovers: Mozu and Furuichi – Calling for World Heritage Status and Warning against Over-commercialization; Protection of Itasuke Kofun by Miyakawa in Osaka|publisher={{ill|Mainichi Shimbun|en|Mainichi Shimbun|qid=Q1136866|lt=Mainichi Shimbun|1=Mainichi Shimbun}}|accessdate=2020-7-25|date=2019-01-05|author=矢追健介}}. At that time, a horned helmet ({{ill|Horned Helmet|ja|衝角付冑|1=Horned Kabuto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horned Helmet|13=User:Immanuelle/Horned Kabuto|qq=}}) shaped {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} excavated from the rear circular part has since become a symbol of cultural property protection for Sakai City. During the construction work, a bridge was built over the moat to allow heavy machinery for soil extraction, and trees were felled. Although the tree felling was partially halted, about half of the tumulus became a {{ill|Barren Hill|ja|はげ山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Barren Hill|1=bald mountain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11275390}}. As of 2019, roughly half of the bridge remains. The barren portion is overgrown with grass, which gives the {{ill|Aerial photography|en|Aerial photography|qid=Q191839|lt=Air Photo|1=Aerial photography}} of Itasuke Kofun a mottled appearance due to the intermingling of trees and vegetation. Although surrounded by a residential area, because remnants of woodland and water remain from the above events, {{ill|Common raccoon dog|en|Common raccoon dog|qid=Q133189|lt=Raccoon|1=Common raccoon dog}} have taken up residence{{cite news|title=Raccoons Inhabit "Itasuke Kofun"|publisher={{ill|The Asahi Shimbun|en|The Asahi Shimbun|qid=Q720503|lt=Asahi Shimbun|1=The Asahi Shimbun}}|url=https://www.asahi.com/sp/articles/ASL243SSZL24PTIL002.html|date=2018-02-14|accessdate=2020-7-25|author=村上潤治}}. In the 1980s, complaints from local residents regarding foul odors due to deteriorated water quality led to lowering the water level and removal of silt. During these efforts, a small wooden boat that had sunk in the southwest part of the surrounding moat was examined and confirmed to be a traditional Japanese boat manufactured at least prior to the early Shōwa period. Because dense bamboo groves pose a risk of soil collapse, Sakai City has been calling for donations to fund maintenance projects, and the {{ill|Hometown tax|en|Hometown tax|qid=Q11277315|lt=Hometown Tax|1=Hometown tax}} system is also being utilized[http://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/oshirase/itasuke_kifu.html "Please help to pass Itasuke Kofun on to the next generation through your donation"] - Sakai City. [[File:Itasuke Kofun horned helmet-shaped Haniwa.JPG]]|Horned helmet-shaped Haniwa
{{small|{{ill|Exhibited at Sakai City Museum|ja|堺市博物館展示|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Exhibited at Sakai City Museum|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}}} == Burial Mound == The dimensions of the tumulus are as follows {{Sfn|百舌鳥古墳群（堺市）|2014年|p=55}}: * Mound length: approximately 146 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}} * Rear circular part – constructed in three tiers: ** Diameter: approximately 90 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}} ** Height: approximately 12.2 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}} * Forepart – constructed in three tiers: ** Width: approximately 99 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}} ** Height: approximately 11.4 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}} == Cultural Properties == === National Historic Site === * Included within the Historic Site “{{ill|Mozu Tombs|en|Mozu Tombs|qid=Q4250584|lt=Mozu Kofun Group|1=Mozu Tombs}}” – Designated as “Itasuke Kofun” on May 15, Showa 31, and on March 18, Heisei 26, a new Historic Site designation was made encompassing the previously designated Itasuke Kofun along with 7 tumuli and an additional 10 sites including {{ill|Zen'emon-yama Kofun|ja|善右ヱ門山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zen'emon-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579266|1=Zen'emon'yama Kofun}}{{国cultural property等データベース|401|1797|百舌鳥古墳群}}. === Sakai City Designated designation1 === * Tangible designation1 ** Horned helmet-shaped {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} (archaeological material) – Designated on December 20, Heisei 13[http://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/kouko/itasukeshutsudo.html Horned helmet-shaped Haniwa] (Sakai City website). == Access == * Approximately a 10-minute walk from {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West Japan Railway Company|1=West Japan Railway Company}}’s {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|qid=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line|1=Hanwa Line}} at {{ill|Mozu Station|en|Mozu Station|qid=Q856909|lt=Mozu Station|1=Mozu Station}}. == Footnote == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2014|chapter=|title=Sakai’s Cultural Properties: Mozu Kofun Group|publisher=Sakai City Cultural Tourism Bureau, Cultural Properties Division|isbn=|ref={{Harvid|百舌鳥古墳群（堺市）|2014年|p=55}}}} == External links == {{Commonscat|Itasuke Kofun}} * [http://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/database/itasuke.html {{ill|Itasuke Kofun|ja|いたすけ古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasuke Kofun|qq=}}] - {{ill|Sakai City Website|ja|堺市ホームページ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai City Website|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Digital Kofun Encyclopedia) * [http://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/itasuke.html {{ill|Itasuke Kofun|ja|いたすけ古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasuke Kofun|qq=}}]、[http://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/zenemonyama.html {{ill|Zen'emon-yama Kofun|ja|善右ヱ門山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zen'emon-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579266|1=Zen'emon'yama Kofun}}] - {{ill|Sakai City Website|ja|堺市ホームページ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai City Website|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Cultural Properties in Sakai City) {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|いたすけ古墳|version=101952934|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:いたすけ古墳]] {{Commons category|Itasuke Kofun}} [[fr:Kofun d'Itasuke]] {{wikidata link|Q11259430}} [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
